description: Welcome to Clayton Street - a modern, 2021-built townhome offering almost 1,900 sq. ft. of thoughtfully designed living space. The open-concept main level features a kitchen, dining, and living area, plus a custom bar with wine fridge and extensive built-ins. Step out from the kitchen to a deck perfect for BBQs and entertaining, with a large ground-level patio and fenced yard. Upstairs has 3 bedrooms, including a primary suite with stunning ensuite and walk-in closet. The large bonus room downstairs can serve as a fourth bedroom. Double side-by-side garage is roughed-in for EV charging. Part of an Energy Star–certified community with remainder of the 2-5-10 New Home Warranty, all near parks, shops, cafés, and schools - this is modern townhome living done right.
